name: Smartsheet
description: A cloud-based work management platform for planning, tracking, automating, and reporting on work (including sheets, dashboards, reports, automation, and integrations).

auth_methods.note: Smartsheet API authentication uses access tokens sent as `Authorization: Bearer ...`, and it also supports OAuth 2.0 using the Authorization Code flow to obtain access tokens.

credential_access.note: Smartsheet Help Center documents that users can generate a personal API access token directly from within their Smartsheet account settings (self-serve), and use it to authenticate API requests.

api_surface.note: Official REST API reference lists broad resource coverage (sheets, rows, columns, users, workspaces, webhooks, attachments, etc.) and links to SDKs for multiple languages.

buildability.note: Smartsheet provides public REST API reference documentation and supports both self-generated access tokens and OAuth 2.0 for authentication, enabling developers to build integrations immediately.

queries: Smartsheet API access token how to obtain site:smartsheet.com
Smartsheet API docs authentication OAuth site:smartsheet.com
